Package io.foldright.wrain

Interface Wrapper<T>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the type of instances that be wrapped
    @ParametersAreNonnullByDefault
@ReturnValuesAreNonnullByDefault
public interface Wrapper<T>
    This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make the wrapper instances as a wrapper chain(linked list).

    All instance method names prefix "wrain" to avoid potential name conflict with subclass method names.

    Author:
    Jerry Lee (oldratlee at gmail dot com)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static <W> boolean check​(W wrapper, Predicate<? super W> predicate)
      Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain satisfy predicate.
      static <W,​V>
      V      		 getAttachment​(W wrapper, String key)
      Retrieves the attachment of wrapper of given key on the wrapper chain by calling Attachable.wrainGet(String).
      static <W> boolean isInstanceOf​(W wrapper, Class<?> clazz)
      Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain matches the given type.
      T wrainUnwrap()
      Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.

    • Method Detail

      • wrainUnwrap

        T wrainUnwrap()
        Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.

        this method also make the wrapper instances as a wrapper chain(linked list).

      • isInstanceOf

        static <W> boolean isInstanceOf​(W wrapper,
                                Class<?> clazz)
        Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain matches the given type.

        The wrapper chain consists of wrapper itself, followed by the wrappers obtained by repeatedly calling wrainUnwrap().

        Type Parameters:
        W - the type of instances that be wrapped
        Parameters:
        wrapper - wrapper instance/wrapper chain
        clazz - target type
        Returns:
        return false if no wrapper on the wrapper chain matches the given type, otherwise return true

      • check

        static <W> boolean check​(W wrapper,
                         Predicate<? super W> predicate)
        Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain satisfy predicate.

        The wrapper chain consists of wrapper itself, followed by the wrappers obtained by repeatedly calling wrainUnwrap().

        Type Parameters:
        W - the type of instances that be wrapped
        Parameters:
        wrapper - wrapper instance/wrapper chain
        predicate - check logic
        Returns:
        return false if no wrapper on the wrapper chain satisfy predicate, otherwise return true

      • getAttachment

        @Nullable
static <W,​V> V getAttachment​(W wrapper,
                                   String key)
        Retrieves the attachment of wrapper of given key on the wrapper chain by calling Attachable.wrainGet(String).

        The wrapper chain consists of wrapper itself, followed by the wrappers obtained by repeatedly calling wrainUnwrap().

        If the key exists in multiple wrappers, outer wrapper win.

        Type Parameters:
        W - the type of instances that be wrapped
        Parameters:
        wrapper - wrapper instance
        key - attachment key
